headline: Why Wabtec (WAB) Is Well Positioned to Grow Through Aftermarket Rail Services and Fleet Modernization
summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation (NYSE:WAB) is one of the Best Railroad Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. As of Q1 2026, 20 billionaires held the stock. On July 8, Stephens resumed coverage of Wabtec with an Overweight rating and a $320 price target. The firm said the transport cycle was broadly improving and […]
